meta.title: Use of Unidirectional Gateways in ICS (Japanese)
meta.description: This presentation in Japanese by Mr. Hirokazu Ofuji at S4xJapan provides a good background of what a unidirectional / one-way gateway is and how it can be deployed in ICS architectures.
